metadata.description: Discipline kit that turns Claude Code into a rigorous academic co-author. Source-grounded writing for LaTeX + BibTeX with deterministic citation enforcement.

plugins.name: claude-research-kit
plugins.description: Question → Evidence → Draft → Verify → Cite discipline for scholarly writing. Tiered session boot, deterministic hooks (citation-gate, block-fabrication, protect-sources, stop-gate, prompt-router), user-invocable skills (claim-check, citation-audit, peer-review, outline, journal-fit, response-to-reviewers), review agents (peer-reviewer, integrity-reviewer, fact-checker, outline-planner), a CLAUDE.md ruleset, reviewer-feedback memory, and field overlays.
